---
title: "Skill Gap Analysis"
ormat:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
    code-overflow: wrap
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: false
---
# Team-Based Skill Level Baseline
## Table
```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
import pandas as pd

skills_data = {
    "Name": ["Jessica", "Jacky"],
    "Python": [3, 3],
    "SQL": [3, 3],
    "Machine Learning": [2, 2],
    "Cloud Computing": [2, 3]
}

df_skills = pd.DataFrame(skills_data)
df_skills.set_index("Name", inplace=True)
df_skills
``` 
## Visualization
```{python}
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(df_skills, annot=True, cmap="coolwarm", linewidths=0.5)
plt.title("Team Skill Levels Heatmap")
plt.show()
```

# Team-Based Skill Gap Analysis
## Table
```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true

```
## Visualization
```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true

```
